summary: A Fox News alert clip showing a darkened booking-style portrait of a bearded man with long hair on screen, with a 'DHS' source label. A chyron reads 'SPANBERGER UNDER FIRE OVER MIGRANT-LINKED MURDERS' over a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner, with a 'MONITORING: BEIRUT' inset at the right.

script.scene: A darkened booking-style portrait of a bearded man is shown; chyron 'SPANBERGER UNDER FIRE OVER MIGRANT-LINKED MURDERS'.

notable_text: DHS; SPANBERGER UNDER FIRE OVER MIGRANT-LINKED MURDERS; FOX NEWS ALERT
